title: Marsui 50 Pcs Wooden Drink Tokens Bulk for Christmas Personalised Drink Tickets Poker Chips for Guest Xmas Favors Beverage Birthday Parties Bar Table Decoration Supplies
features: Bright Drink Tokens: Our Christmas-themed wooden drink tokens are made of sturdy and durable wood, and will not be damaged even after long use. The tokens feature bright green and red patterns, adding an energetic touch to your Christmas party and creating a warm and charming atmosphere

Durable Material and Natural Colour: our Christmas wine glass wooden drink tokens are crafted from durable, long lasting wood, ensuring that they withstand long time use without breaking; Featuring natural colours, these tokens bring a vintage, rustic touch to your event, creating an ambiance of cosiness and charm

Compact Size for Handy Use: each of our rustic wooden drink tokens measures approximately 1.57 x 1.57 x 0.12 inches/ 4 x 4 x 0.3 cm; This size is practical, making them easy to grip, handle, and store; With such handy sized tokens at your event, you can easily manage your guests' drinks and prevent overconsumption or wastage

Thoughtful Detailing: our Christmas wine glass wooden drinks tokens are specially designed with clear, drink related messages and artful patterns, including Christmas wine glass, boasting Christmas style; These delightful details not only help in easy identification but also enhance the overall aesthetic of your event

Versatile for Various Themes: our tokens for events seamlessly blend with various themes, particularly those with the Christmas style; Whether are organizing a retro themed birthday or a countryside Christmas party, these tokens surely elevate the aesthetic of your event
